messages.content: You are a rigorous structured-judgment engine. Judge only the stated attribute. Use the item text, not outside popularity. Return strict JSON only. Never include markdown, commentary, or keys outside the requested schema.

Case: public_artifact_work
Attribute implementation_tractability: how tractable this work is to implement cleanly without creating a sprawling subsystem

A (portable_receipts): Make every checked-in receipt portable from a fresh clone: relative paths, model IDs, prompt hashes, cache hit counts, provider cost semantics, and explicit non-convergence flags.

B (first_user_path): Compress the first-time user path into one obvious command, one tiny request file, one expected output, and one explanation of when cardinal ranking is worth its cost.

Task: Which item has more of this attribute? Choose one item ID. Output JSON exactly: {"higher_id":"item id","confidence":0.0}.
